access_token.description: Outreach OAuth2 access token (resolved from legacy's refresh-token grant). Sent as a Bearer token; never logged. The client_id/client_secret/refresh_token exchange is performed outside this connector.

base_url.description: Outreach API base URL override for tests or proxies. Defaults to https://api.outreach.io/api/v2.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only records updated at or after this time are read (sent as filter[updatedAt]).

page_size.description: Documentary page-size knob retained from legacy config; streams send page[size]=100 statically and then follow JSON:API links.next.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

account_note_id.description: Optional Outreach identifier used by the account_note detail stream.
